seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / all-false baseline.
mutation: composite: skin weighted Max-SAT as a vaccine cold-chain compliance switchboard; mixed positive/negative-leaning weighted OR-requirements so neither all-ON nor all-OFF is near-optimal, forcing genuine constraint-optimization; score = satisfied weight / all-OFF baseline weight.
title: Cold-Chain Compliance Switchboard
strategies: all-OFF baseline (trivial reference the checker measures)
per-switch weighted majority: set each switch to the polarity holding more incident requirement weight (one pass, ignores clause interactions)
multi-restart hill-climbing local search: incremental flip gains from a greedy start plus seeded random restarts, keep best
DP / branch-and-bound relaxations or Max-SAT solvers for small instances
